title: SID History Injection via mimikatz
description: Detects mimikatz commands that inject a privileged SID into the sidHistory attribute of a controlled account (sid::patch, sid::add, misc::addsid), granting domain-admin-equivalent access. GOAD shows golden tickets with SID history across forest trusts.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*sid::patch*' or 'Command Line' like '*sid::add*' or 'Command Line' like '*misc::addsid*' or 'Command Line' like '*Add-ADGroupMember -SIDHistory*')))
